commands.name: Join Zoom Meeting
commands.description: Open the Zoom join meeting dialog via URL scheme

commands.name: New Zoom Meeting
commands.description: Start a new instant Zoom meeting

commands.name: Mute Zoom Audio
commands.target:
tell application "zoom.us" to activate
tell application "System Events" to keystroke "a" using {command down, shift down}
commands.description: Toggle mute on your Zoom microphone using the keyboard shortcut

commands.name: Toggle Zoom Video
commands.target:
tell application "zoom.us" to activate
tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using {command down, shift down}
commands.description: Toggle your Zoom camera on or off using the keyboard shortcut
